title: Proceed to waiting room after valid alias and reveal confirmation
description: Verifies a visitor can enter a valid alias, confirm the reveal modal, and reach the waiting room successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/
Fill 'TestAlias' into the alias input field
Click the 'Find a Stranger' submit button
Verify the reveal modal is visible (data-testid='enter-void-btn' is present)
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn'
Verify the URL is now /waiting
Verify the text 'finding your stranger' is visible

title: Leave lobby returns to landing page
description: After entering the waiting room as a solo user (no match available), clicking Leave Lobby emits leave_queue and navigates back to /.

steps.description: Navigate to / and hard-reload to get a fresh socket
Fill 'LeaveTester2' into the alias field
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal
Verify the waiting room is showing (text 'finding your stranger' visible)
Click the 'Leave Lobby' button in the bottom-right corner
Verify the URL returns to / (landing page)
Verify the alias input field is visible on landing page

title: Start matchmaking using Enter key
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a valid alias using the Enter key and proceed through the reveal confirmation to the waiting room.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/
Fill 'EnterKeyUser' into the alias input field
Press Enter key in the alias input field to submit
Verify the reveal modal appears (data-testid='enter-void-btn' is visible)
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn'
Verify the URL is /waiting and waiting room is shown

title: Rejoin queue successfully after leaving lobby
description: Verifies a user can leave the lobby and then start matchmaking again in the same visit without stale state blocking re-queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Stranger_Requeue into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal
Click the leave lobby control
Fill Stranger_Requeue2 into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal
Verify the user lands in the waiting room

title: Online count is visible on landing
description: Verifies the landing page displays an online stranger count indicator so visitors can gauge activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify an online strangers count indicator is displayed

title: Waiting room shows online count panel
description: Verifies the waiting room displays the online stranger count panel while the user is queued.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Stranger_Count into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal
Verify an online strangers count indicator is displayed in the waiting room

title: Waiting room shows waiting state UI
description: Verifies the waiting room shows the queue waiting animation/state to indicate the user is in the lobby.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Stranger_WaitUI into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal
Verify a waiting animation or waiting state is displayed

title: Block alias with disallowed characters
description: Verifies that submitting an alias containing disallowed characters is prevented and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill bad!alias into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Verify a username character validation error is visible

title: Block alias longer than 20 characters
description: Verifies that submitting an alias longer than the maximum length is prevented and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill ThisAliasIsWayTooLongOver20 into the alias field
Submit the alias to start matchmaking
Verify a username length validation error is visible

title: Read safety guidance and return to start matchmaking
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate to the Safety page from the landing page and return to the landing page ready to start matchmaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item that opens the Safety page
Scroll through the Safety content
Click the navigation item that returns to the landing page
Verify the landing page shows the alias entry and a control to start matchmaking

title: Read philosophy content and return to start matchmaking
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate to the Philosophy page from the landing page and return to the landing page ready to start matchmaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item that opens the Philosophy page
Scroll through the Philosophy content
Click the navigation item that returns to the landing page
Verify the landing page shows the alias entry and a control to start matchmaking

title: Navigate between Safety and Philosophy without losing ability to start
description: Verifies a safety-conscious visitor can move between Safety and Philosophy pages and still return to the landing page able to begin matchmaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item that opens the Safety page
Click the navigation item that opens the Philosophy page
Click the navigation item that returns to the landing page
Verify the landing page shows the alias entry and a control to start matchmaking

title: Safety page is reachable via direct navigation
description: Verifies the Safety page loads via direct navigation and presents informational content.

steps.description: Navigate to /safety
Scroll through the page
Verify safety guidance content is displayed

title: Philosophy page is reachable via direct navigation
description: Verifies the Philosophy page loads via direct navigation and presents informational content.

steps.description: Navigate to /philosophy
Scroll through the page
Verify product philosophy or about content is displayed

title: Landing page loads with hero, alias input and CTA visible
description: Verifies the landing page renders the hero heading, alias input field, and 'Find a Stranger' button without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the heading 'Icebreaker.io' is visible
Verify the alias input field is visible and focused
Verify the 'Find a Stranger' button is visible

title: Empty alias shows error message on Enter key press
description: Verifies pressing Enter with an empty alias field shows the 'alias cannot be empty' error message.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/
Click the alias input field without typing anything
Press Enter key in the alias input field
Verify an error message containing 'alias cannot be empty' is displayed
Verify the URL remains at / (no navigation occurred)
Verify the reveal modal is NOT visible

title: Alias with special characters shows validation error
description: Verifies entering an alias like 'Bad@lias!' shows a validation error and does not open the reveal modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 'Bad@lias!' into the alias field
Press Enter or click Find a Stranger
Verify an error message about allowed characters is displayed
Verify the reveal modal does NOT appear

title: Find a Stranger button is disabled when alias is empty
description: Verifies the submit button is in a disabled state when the alias input is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the 'Find a Stranger' button has the disabled attribute when alias input is empty
Fill a single character into the alias field
Verify the 'Find a Stranger' button is now enabled

title: Online stranger count shows a number on landing page
description: Verifies the live stranger count indicator is present on the landing page and shows a numeric value.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify text matching 'stranger(s) online' is visible on the page
Verify the pulsing amber dot indicator is visible

title: Navbar links to Safety and Philosophy are visible
description: Verifies the top navbar contains working links to the Safety and Philosophy pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the navbar contains a 'Safety' link
Verify the navbar contains a 'Philosophy' link
Click the Safety navbar link
Verify the URL changes to /safety

title: Reveal modal appears after valid alias submission
description: Verifies the RevealModal opens when a valid alias is submitted before navigating to the waiting room.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 'TestUser' into the alias field
Click 'Find a Stranger' button
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn' to confirm the reveal modal

title: Waiting room displays 'finding your stranger' heading
description: Verifies the waiting room renders its primary heading and animation after entering the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/
Fill 'WaitingUser' into the alias input field
Click Find a Stranger to open the reveal modal
Click the button with data-testid='enter-void-btn'
Verify the text 'finding your stranger' is visible in the waiting room
Verify the URL is /waiting

title: Waiting room shows stranger count from socket
description: Verifies the online count panel in the top-right of the waiting room receives and displays a count.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 'CountChecker' into the alias field and proceed through reveal modal
Verify the top-right panel shows 'Currently Online' label
Verify a numeric stranger count or dash placeholder is displayed

title: Leave Lobby button is visible and functional in waiting room
description: Verifies the Leave Lobby button (data-testid=leave-lobby-btn) is present in the waiting room and clicking it returns the user to /.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/waiting (accessible directly without sessionStorage)
Verify the text 'finding your stranger' is visible confirming the waiting room loaded
Verify a button with data-testid='leave-lobby-btn' is present on the page
Click the button with data-testid='leave-lobby-btn'
Verify the URL is now http://localhost:5174/ (landing page)
Verify the alias input field is visible on the landing page

title: Result screen shows you matched when outcome is connected (demo mode)
description: Uses ?demo=connected query param to render the connected result screen without needing a real session.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=connected
Verify the heading 'you matched.' is visible
Verify the stranger username 'DemoStranger' is displayed
Verify a share link button is visible on the page

title: Result screen shows gone when outcome is vanished (demo mode)
description: Uses ?demo=vanished query param to render the vanish result screen without needing a real session.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=vanished
Verify the text 'gone.' is visible on the page
Verify no share link button is present
Verify a 'match again' link is present

title: Share link copy button works on connected result screen (demo mode)
description: Uses ?demo=connected to test the copy-to-clipboard share link interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=connected
Verify the share link text 'icebreaker.io/link/demo123' is visible as a button
Click the share link button
Verify the button text changes to 'copied ✓'

title: Match Again button navigates to landing and clears session
description: Verifies clicking 'match again' on the result page clears sessionStorage and navigates to /.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/test-room-999
Inject sessionStorage key 'gameOver' with value {"outcome":"connected","strangerUsername":"Nova","shareLink":"https://icebreaker.io/link/zzz"}
Reload the page
Click 'match again →' button
Verify URL is now /
Verify sessionStorage is cleared (no gameOver key)

title: Identity reveal toggle switches blur state
description: Verifies the toggle in the result screen reveals/hides the contact credentials with blur effect.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/test-room-toggle
Inject sessionStorage 'gameOver' with outcome=connected and 'revealPrefs' with {"shareEnabled":false,"contact":"@handle","note":"hey!"}
Reload the page
Verify the contact field is blurred (blur CSS applied)
Click the identity sharing toggle button
Verify the contact field is no longer blurred and '@handle' is readable

title: Safety page has correct heading and content
description: Verifies /safety page renders safety-related content with an appropriate heading.

steps.description: Navigate to /safety
Verify the page contains a heading or content section related to safety
Verify the page is not blank and has visible text content

title: Philosophy page has correct heading and content
description: Verifies /philosophy page renders philosophy-related content with an appropriate heading.

steps.description: Navigate to /philosophy
Verify the page contains a heading or content section related to philosophy
Verify the page is not blank and has visible text content

title: Unknown route redirects to landing page
description: Verifies navigating to an unknown route like /xyz redirects to / via the wildcard route.

steps.description: Navigate to /this-route-does-not-exist
Verify the URL is redirected to /
Verify the landing page content is visible

title: Enter the Void navbar button opens reveal modal
description: Verifies the 'Enter the Void' button in the navbar opens the RevealModal when a valid alias is present.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 'NavbarUser' into the alias field
Click the 'Enter the Void' button in the navbar
Verify the reveal modal appears

title: Alias exactly 20 characters is accepted
description: Verifies a 20-character alias at the boundary is accepted and proceeds to the reveal modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill exactly 20 valid characters (e.g. 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRST') into the alias field
Click Find a Stranger
Verify no validation error is shown
Verify the reveal modal appears

title: Alias with only spaces is rejected
description: Verifies an alias consisting entirely of spaces is rejected with an empty error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill five spaces into the alias field
Click Find a Stranger or press Enter
Verify an error message is shown (alias cannot be empty after trim)
Verify the reveal modal does NOT appear

title: Match Again button on result screen navigates to landing
description: Verifies clicking 'match again →' on the demo result screen navigates to /.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=connected
Verify 'you matched.' heading is visible
Click the 'match again →' button
Verify the URL is now /
Verify the landing page alias input is visible

title: Match Again clears sessionStorage on click
description: Verifies clicking 'match again' calls sessionStorage.clear() so no stale game state remains.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=vanished
Click the 'match again →' button
Verify URL is / (landing)
Verify sessionStorage does not contain a 'gameOver' key

title: Identity sharing toggle reveals blurred contact info
description: Verifies the identity reveal toggle on the connected result screen unblurs contact credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/demo-room?demo=connected
Verify 'you matched.' is visible
Verify the identity sharing toggle button is present
Click the identity sharing toggle to enable sharing
Verify the toggle is now in the 'on' / active state (amber colour)

title: Session demo shows prompt card with hardcoded prompt text
description: Verifies the session demo mode at /session/demo?demo=session renders the prompt card with the correct prompt text.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/session/demo?demo=session
Verify the element with data-testid='session-demo' is present
Verify the element with data-testid='prompt-card' is visible
Verify the element with data-testid='prompt-text' contains text 'What\'s something you believed until embarrassingly recently?'

title: Session demo shows round indicator and turn counter at 3/6
description: Verifies the session demo renders round bar showing round 3 of 3 and the 3/6 messages turn counter.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/session/demo?demo=session
Verify the element with data-testid='round-bar' is present
Verify the element with data-testid='round-label' contains text 'round 3 of 3'
Verify the element with data-testid='turn-counter' contains text '3 / 6 messages'
Verify the element with data-testid='turn-indicator' contains text 'your turn'

title: Session demo shows two message bubbles on correct sides
description: Verifies the message thread in demo mode shows your message on the right and the stranger message on the left.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/session/demo?demo=session
Verify the element with data-testid='message-thread' is present
Verify there is an element with data-testid='message-bubble-right' (your message on the right)
Verify there is an element with data-testid='message-bubble-left' (stranger message on the left)
Verify data-testid='message-bubble-right' contains text about Great Wall of China
Verify data-testid='message-bubble-left' contains text about decimate

title: Waiting-for-other message appears after selecting an answer in demo mode
description: Verifies clicking an answer in demo session shows waiting-for-stranger UI state.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5174/session/demo?demo=session
Verify the prompt card with data-testid='prompt-card' is visible
Verify data-testid='send-btn' is present
Verify data-testid='turn-indicator' contains 'your turn'

title: Session page renders nothing when no matchPayload and no demo param
description: Verifies /session/:roomId renders blank (null guard) when accessed without sessionStorage or ?demo param.

steps.description: Clear sessionStorage in browser
Navigate to http://localhost:5174/session/orphan-room (no ?demo param)
Verify no question card, prompt card, or answer options are rendered
Verify the page is blank or shows only minimal content (null render)

title: GET /health returns 200 with status ok
description: Verifies the backend health check endpoint is reachable and returns the expected status.

steps.description: Send HTTP GET request to http://localhost:3001/health
Verify response status is 200
Verify response body contains field 'status' with value 'ok'

title: GET /api/stats returns onlineCount and activeSessions
description: Verifies the stats endpoint returns the expected JSON structure.

steps.description: Send HTTP GET request to http://localhost:3001/api/stats
Verify response status is 200
Verify response JSON contains numeric field 'onlineCount'
Verify response JSON contains numeric field 'activeSessions'

title: GET /api/prompts returns non-empty array of strings
description: Verifies the prompts endpoint returns a non-empty array of string prompts.

steps.description: Send HTTP GET request to http://localhost:3001/api/prompts
Verify response status is 200
Verify response body is a JSON array
Verify the array has at least one element and each element is a string
